"RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "Scala REPL.Scala REPL.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.AdminApiControllerSpec.Admin API should A call to Api admin API must Conflict :: Name already exists.executor": "Run", to Usage plan admin API must GET :: Ok.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.Anyone can ask access for an api.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a api editor can transfer API ownership to another team (with all versions).executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a api editor can transfer API ownership to another team with in progress demand.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a deletion of a plan must delete all subscriptions.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a simple test can api-keys creation on otoroshi.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a subscription should be not available right now if plan's subscription process is manual.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a subscription should be possible just one time if the option is default.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can [BETTER] delete an api subscription from an api of his team.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can create usage plan with only otoroshiTarget entities for which access is authorized.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can delete an api of his team.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can delete an api subscription from an api of his team.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can not subscribe to an api with his personnal team if tenant enabled subscription security.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can not transfer child subscriptions to another team but parent subscription.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can not update a subscription to another api (even if it's own).executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can search a team.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can see his teams.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can setup validUntil date for a subscription to his api.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can transfer child subscriptions to another team which have already a subscription when child plan allow it.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can transfer child subscriptions to another team which have already a subscription when parent plan allow it.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can transfer subscriptions to another team.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can update a subscription to his api.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can update an api of his team.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a tenant administrator can not initialize apis for a tenant for which he's not admin
a tenant administrator can not initialize apis from his tenant for a tenant for which he's not admin
a tenant administrator can initialize tenant apis
a tenant administrator can not initialize subscriptions for a tenant for which he's not admin
a tenant administrator can initialize tenant subscriptions
a tenant administrator can not manipulate api if tenant api creation security is enabled & team.apisCreationPermission is disabled
a tenant administrator can setup a client name pattern to customize created APIkey name.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a tenant administrator can not initialize apis for a tenant for which he's not admin.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a tenant administrator can setup a client name pattern to customize created APIkey name.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a user can can get his subscription for a private api if team is authorized.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a user can subscribe to an api.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can [archive by admin] be disable entirely by disabling parent subscription.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be controlled by a security tenant in environment mode.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be deleted entirely by deleting the parent sub.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be disable by part by disabling child subscription by owner.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be disable by part by disabling child subscription.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be disable entirely by disabling parent subscription by admin.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be disable entirely by disabling parent subscription by owner.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be disable entirely by disabling parent subscription.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be exploded in parts by deleting the parent sub.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be kept in part by deleting the parent sub (first child become parent).executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can be transform in unique api key.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can match client id of this parent.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can not be controlled by a security tenant in environment mode.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can not be enabled on plan when aggregation environment on tenant is disabled.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can not be possible when environments are not the sames (& security activated).executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can not be used when the mode is disabled on plan
aggregate api keys can not be extended subscription that we have already a parent
aggregate api keys can not be enabled on plan when aggregation on tenant is disabled
aggregate api keys can match client id of this parent
aggregate api keys can be transformed in unique api key when the subscription hasn't parent
aggregate api keys can be transform in unique api key
aggregate api keys can failed when aggregated apikey has an otoroshi target different than parent
aggregate api keys can update aggregated APIkey do not erase authorizedEntities
aggregate api keys can update plan in aggregated APIkey do not erase authorizedEntities
aggregate api keys can be disable entirely by disabling parent subscription
aggregate api keys can be disable by part by disabling child subscription
aggregate api keys can be disable entirely by disabling parent subscription by owner
aggregate api keys can be disable by part by disabling child subscription by owner
aggregate api keys can be deleted entirely by deleting the parent sub
aggregate api keys can be kept in part by deleting the parent sub (first child become parent)
aggregate api keys can be exploded in parts by deleting the parent sub
aggregate api keys can be controlled by a security tenant in environment mode.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can test update.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can update aggregated APIkey do not erase authorizedEntities.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can update aggregated APIkey do not update change authorizedEntities.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.aggregate api keys can update plan in aggregated APIkey do not erase authorizedEntities.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.an admin api must cannot be updated except otoroshi target of admin plan.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.an api can have a lifecycle.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.an api can list all subscribed apis.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.executor": "Debug", "ScalaTest.ApiLifeCycleSpec.API life cycle must be smart
API life cycle must notify customer when API lifeCycle change needs to.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.ApiLifeCycleSpec.API life cycle must notify customer when API is deprecated.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.BasicUsageSpec (1).executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.BasicUsageSpec.daikoku ldap module can check if email exists in ldap.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.BasicUsageSpec.daikoku ldap module can used fallback urls

sync should correctly sync customMetadata when all values are strings
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should correctly sync customMetadata when some values are not just string
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should correctly sync when customMetadata is absent or empty
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should correctly merge metadata in aggregated subscriptions when child has boolean values
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should preserve other subscriptions metadata when one child plan is missing
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should preserve Otoroshi-native metadata not managed by Daikoku after sync
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should correctly sync tags
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should correctly sync metadata with expression language
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after api or plan update
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after subscription archive by owner
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after subscription archive
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after subscription update by api owner
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after child subscription update by owner
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after made unique child subscription
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after child subscription deletion
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after subscription creation
OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after child subscription creation.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.OtoroshiSyncSpec.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.TeamControllerSpec.a daikoku admin can create team even if teamCreationSecurity is active.executor": "Run", "ScalaTest.TeamControllerSpec.a daikoku admin can create, update or delete a team
a daikoku admin can not ask join a personal team
a daikoku admin can not add/remove member from a personal team

a daikoku admin can not update apikey visibility for team admin
a daikoku admin can update team api creation permission

component.name: RunManager
component.selected: ScalaTest.ApiControllerSpec.a team administrator can create usage plan with only otoroshiTarget entities for which access is authorized

option.name: testName
option.value: OtoroshiVerifierJob sync should be run after parent subscription archive
